GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is chosen when a customer requests information or assistance regarding modifying their current insurance coverage options.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the customer requests guidance on coverage options, provide information about available choices and their implications.
If the customer wishes to proceed with a coverage change, direct them to update their policy under the 'Policy Update Assistance' topic.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide information on modifying vehicle insurance coverage options, including explaining coverage details and assisting with adjustments. You aren't able to process claims or renew policies.
